name: Robert Rauschenberg Foundation
description:
The Robert Rauschenberg Foundation fosters the legacy of Rauschenberg’s life, work, and philosophy that art can change the world. The foundation supports artists, initiatives, and institutions that embody the same fearlessness, innovation, and multidisciplinary approach that Rauschenberg exemplified in both his art and philanthropic endeavors.

The foundation focuses on three major areas: 1) increasing public access to and scholarship of Rauschenberg’s artwork; 2) cultivating emerging and established artists through a residency program at the artist’s Captiva, Florida, home and studio; and 3) creating philanthropic initiatives that connect art, culture, and creativity with important issues such as education and climate change.

Rauschenberg was a strong believer in collaboration between artists and across cultures. His life and work demonstrated how art could be a vehicle for social change, locally and globally. We are proud to carry Rauschenberg’s legacy forward, and the impact of his spirit and style are reflected in the projects that we invest in.

name: Third Eye Collective
description:
Two longtime friends and colleagues had an idea for a new agency with a different point of view.

Say hello to Third Eye, a strategic marketing, communications, and brand evolution agency innovating across the worlds of art, architecture, design, fashion, hospitality, and luxury. Our intuition flows from a rich network of experience across these industries, allowing us to effectively see the opportunities and synergies they share.

We believe traditional PR has limits and that culture is consumed at a cross-section, not in silos. The best way to communicate and connect with audiences is changing, and our insight into this dynamic landscape of contemporary culture means we can expand our clients’ influence by going beyond classic media and marketing strategies. We work together to forge partnerships across cultural disciplines and develop curatorial projects as part of multidisciplinary campaigns that resonate locally and globally.

When you hire us, you are not hiring a firm, but beginning a real connection built on dialogue. Each relationship starts with direct engagement with the Co-Founders, a diverse duo with distinct areas of expertise. Collaboration and congeniality are at the core of our company culture and central to our creative process. This means we think holistically and always keep our partners’ objectives in our line of sight.

name: UNICORN in every stall
description:
UNICORN | Redefining Period Care, One Restroom Stall at a Time

UNICORN is redefining restroom essentials by making organic period products available in every stall, so quality and dignity are always within reach. With our sleek, low-profile dispensers, we’re bringing sustainable and high-quality period care to workplaces, campuses, and public spaces committed to supporting wellness and inclusion.

Our journey began with a shared mission: to break down barriers in period care. Inspired to address period poverty, our founders created UNICORN to ensure that everyone has access to essential care, just as they would with any other basic restroom item. Today, institutions like JPMorgan Chase & Co. are leading by example, making UNICORN products a part of everyday restroom experiences and setting a new standard for accessibility and care.

With a focus on sustainability and streamlined design, UNICORN dispensers are crafted to fit seamlessly into restrooms without compromising aesthetics or functionality. For businesses and institutions, this means an easy, impactful way to elevate restroom standards and provide thoughtful support to those they serve.

Join us in a movement toward better, more inclusive restroom experiences—where quality, accessibility, and sustainability meet.

The world’s first venture capital fund focused on Sexual Health & Women’s Health Technology startups.

Amboy Street Ventures invests in the Seed and Series A rounds of Sexual Health & Women’s Health Technology startups that are progressing the industry in America and Europe. 

Amboy Street Ventures is an active investor and adds value above and beyond capital. Its dedicated Value Enhancement Team supports portfolio companies with marketing & branding, sales & distribution, product development & scientific innovation and public education resources through its position within the Healthy Pleasure Group, an ecosystem dedicated to solving the problems that startups face in the Sexual Health and Women’s Health Tech market.

name: National Association Of Special Education Teachers
description: The National Association of Special Education Teachers (NASET) is a national professional association that seeks to meet a critical need for many of America's special education teachers. NASET was established as a professional organization for former, current, and future special education teachers who had no professional organization to call their own. NASET develops and promotes professional excellence through the support of teachers who provide services to children with special needs. The National Association of Special Education Teachers (NASET) is dedicated to ensuring that all children and adolescents with special needs receive the best education possible. NASET serves the professional interest of special education teachers in order to promote the highest professional standards. The National Association of Special Education Teachers (NASET) helps members stay abreast of current issues that are shaping the field, affecting the lives of students, and influencing professional careers. NASET is committed to standards of excellence and innovation in educational research, practice, and policy. NASET works to enhance professional practice for teachers of special education and to build public support for high quality special education programs. The National Association of Special Education Teachers (NASET) represents the very best in our profession. We take our direction from practicing special education teachers who have been recognized for their excellence and vision. NASET advances and encourages the professional development of its members through networking, research, publications, and membership benefits. We hope you will take time to learn more about us and consider joining us in promoting a strong national association dedicated solely for teachers in the field of special education.

name: Hangman NYC
description:
Hangman Fine Art Services is a full-service logistics partner for galleries, collectors, institutions, and artists across the country. With locations in New York, Los Angeles, and Miami, we offer local and national support for fine art transportation, expert packing and crating, climate-controlled storage, and museum-quality installation.

Our team of highly trained technicians and Client Experience Managers is the heart of what sets Hangman apart. We hire and develop the top talent in the industry to ensure that every object is handled with precision, care, and deep respect for its value and meaning.

Whether you’re managing a multistop museum tour or need same-day service for a last-minute install, Hangman has you covered. Our fleet includes state-of-the-art, climate-controlled, air-ride vehicles—including electric vans in NYC and LA—equipped with 24/7 GPS and remote climate monitoring for peace of mind in transit.

Our adaptable shuttle system offers consolidated and direct service to major U.S. markets with flexible scheduling and transparent pricing. We also provide condition reporting, insurance coordination, viewing rooms, and custom crating solutions tailored to your needs.

With Hangman, you don’t just get a vendor—you gain a collaborative partner committed to elevating the logistics experience through white-glove service, clear communication, and thoughtful solutions at every step.

name: Huntington T. Block Insurance Agency, Inc.

Our clients rely on our expert advice to help them manage unique risk situations or events. We are always ready to offer our service to help you ensure the safe keeping of your collections. name: Gordon Companies
description: The Gordon Companies is a family owned business operated by Jeffrey and David Gordon, second generation of the Gordon Development Company. Established in 2001 by David and Jeffrey after a combined 30 years of industry experience The Gordon Companies is quickly making its mark on the development community in the eastern United States. The Gordon Companies is comprised of several specialized divisions, from retail to residential to hotel development. With the expertise to provide services ranging from ground-up development and construction to renovation, leasing and management The Gordon Companies is as diverse as today's industry. In addition to managing approximately one million square feet of retail space in New York, Vermont, Massachusetts, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Ohio with its retail management division, The Gordon Companies continues to expand its other divisions. The Gordon Companies hospitality division has developed and owns hotels in New York, Vermont, and is developing in Massachusetts. With its residential division, the company has completed over one hundred condominium units, owns approximately one hundred apartment units and has two hundred units in the approval process. Also, under development are several hundred condominiums and single-family subdivisions. The Gordon Companies are also in the development stage of several retail projects in New York and New Jersey and has developed and built Store Away, a self-storage facility in New York.

Based in a vast former tobacco warehouse, it unites artist studios, exhibition spaces, and ancillary services in a single location, facilitating conversation and collaboration among its burgeoning creative community. 

Visitors receive unparalleled access to all projects occurring inside Mana, and experience a range of art-making techniques and presentations first-hand. A transparent, comprehensive hub of creativity, Mana offers a profound, personal approach to contemporary art.

name: Bourlet Art Logistics
description: James Bourlet has been a familiar and trusted name in the art world since the 1800s. Our clientele have included private collectors, auction houses, museums, corporations, and heads of state. We have handled some of the most complex and demanding projects with James Bourlet's distinctive brand of dexterity and discretion. Bourlet ArtLogistics is one of the top providers of fine arts, antiques packing and shipping services to both domestic and international destinations. We have been safely shipping and storing antiques and works of fine arts since last few decades. Bourlet ArtLogistics offers collections and deliveries of all types of fine art, fine furniture and objects d'art. Our exclusive shipping services use dedicated and protected trucks that are available to provide services to all regional and national locations. Our other services include local and long haul trucking, import and export freight forwarding and air and sea container services. We also provide expert local and regional installations of all types of artworks. Bourlet ArtLogistics also offers insurance coverage over all art property that is shipped or transferred via its carrier - to make sure that your precious and artistic belongings stay safe and shining. The present owners, now doing business as Bourlet ArtLogistics, have maintained the exacting standards and high level of client accommodation that have characterized the company since its inception. We have ensured through innovation, attentiveness to client needs and a strong commitment to excellence that Bourlet ArtLogistics continues to be a trusted service provider to the arts community.

name: Paragon Legal
description:
Paragon is a premier legal services firm providing interim in-house counsel to businesses with growing legal teams as well as Fortune 500 corporate legal departments.

Paragon attorneys have deep experience in a wide range of practice areas — including privacy, employment, and intellectual property — and are ready to help your legal team tackle its next challenge. Whether you’re looking for specific expertise, the flexibility to move attorneys between teams, or assistance during a hiring freeze or tight budget period, Paragon has you covered.

Are you intrigued by the opportunity to work in-house on an interim basis with some of the U.S.’ leading companies? Our unique model and culture allows individuals with a passion for challenging legal work to make a real impact while maintaining flexibility and control over their personal schedule.

To learn more about us, visit www.paragonlegal.com or get in touch at info@paragonlegal.com.

The best flex legal talent when you need it. Extraordinary talent. Immediate impact.

name: J. Paul Getty Trust
description:
One of the largest supporters of arts in the world, the J. Paul Getty Trust is an international cultural and philanthropic institution that focuses on the visual arts in all their dimensions. Getty serves both the general public and a wide range of professional communities in Los Angeles and throughout the world.

Through the work of the four Getty programs—the Museum, Research Institute, Conservation Institute, and Foundation—the Getty aims to further knowledge and nurture critical seeing through the growth and presentation of its collections and by advancing the understanding and preservation of the world's artistic heritage. The Getty pursues this mission with the conviction that cultural awareness, creativity, and aesthetic enjoyment are essential to a vital and civil society.

name: PLATFORM:
description:
Platform is an artist-driven brand selling one-of-a-kind artworks, exclusive artist-designed products, and fine art prints. We partner with today’s most influential artists and galleries to offer regular releases of new things worth collecting.

Platform launched in 2021, and we select the artwork we offer in partnership with world-renowned gallery David Zwirner.

name: Crozier Fine Arts
description:
We care about art and the people who love it.

As members of the greater art world ecosystem, we are dedicated to serving artists, collectors, and art connoisseurs wherever they are.

With 30 international locations in the US, Europe, and Asia, Crozier provides all of our art logistics solutions—including art transportation, storage space, customs support, and expert guidance—all over the world.

Shipping your artwork doesn’t need to be scary. Crozier’s global transportation network can safely move your art across borders and overseas. International collaborations and industry partnerships further allow us to move, handle, and manage art globally—and keep it safe when you need to jet.  

Crozier is part of Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), the global leader in innovative storage and information management services, storing and protecting valued assets, including highly sensitive data, critical business information, and cultural and historical artefacts.

name: Sixth Street
description:
Sixth Street is a global investment firm with over $100 billion in assets under management and committed capital.* The firm uses its long-term flexible capital, data-enabled capabilities and One Team culture to develop themes and offer solutions to companies across all stages of growth. 

Founded in 2009, Sixth Street has more than 650 team members including over 280 investment professionals operating globally.

We invest through our diversified, collaborative investment platforms: TAO, Growth, Direct Lending, Strategic Capital, Fundamental Strategies, Infrastructure, Insurance, Structured Products, Agriculture, and Credit Market Strategies. 

*AUM is presented as of 12/31/24, unless otherwise noted. AUM includes the net asset value, plus outstanding leverage and asset-based financing undrawn amounts, in respect of private investment funds, certain co-investment vehicles and accounts for which Sixth Street provides investment management or advisory services, as well as capital that such funds, vehicles and accounts have the right to call from investors pursuant to the terms of their capital commitments, and additional fundraising commitments and fund, vehicle and account liquidations since 12/31/24. In the case of Sixth Street-managed business development companies, AUM reflects their total assets (i.e., gross of any fund-level liabilities) plus asset-based financing undrawn amounts, as well as capital that such companies have the right to call from investors pursuant to the terms of their capital commitments. With respect to Sixth Street-managed collateralized loan obligations, AUM reflects the face amount of debt and equity outstanding. AUM includes capital to be managed in connection with the strategic partnership discussed in the press release: https://bit.ly/4lo0M7O. Calculation of AUM differs from the calculation of regulatory assets under management in Form ADV filings and may differ from the AUM calculation methodologies used by other investment managers.

name: Baird
description:
Since 1919, Baird has guided families, businesses, communities and institutions toward their financial goals. Being privately held enables us to prioritize long-term planning and investment – for our clients and the firm – without having to weigh those against the quarterly expectations of outside shareholders. 

Today Baird offers wealth management, investment banking, asset management, fixed income and equity sales and trading, equity research, public finance and private equity services. This balance of cyclical and counter-cyclical businesses provides financial strength and stability across market environments and enables us to consistently reinvest in our ability to serve clients.

We manage or oversee more than $455 billion in client assets and employ more than 5,200 Associates around the world. And, because nearly 80% of our associates are Baird stockholders, you can trust we all share a personal stake in your success.

For more than 20 consecutive years, Baird has been one of the FORTUNE 100 Best Companies to Work For®, making us a workplace of choice for some of the most talented, passionate people in financial services. It also enables us to emphasize cultural compatibility in those we hire, many of whom stay their entire careers. All of this helps ensure the quality and consistency of our advice for clients and the timeless values that make the Baird Difference every day for our clients, our Associates and the communities we share. 

For more information, please visit https://www.rwbaird.com/bairddifference/.

name: Hudson Hill Capital
description:
Hudson Hill Capital® is a private investment firm founded by Eric Rosen. Eric has spent the last 30+ years investing in middle market businesses through permanent capital sources – affording a unique perspective within the private equity industry. We leverage Eric’s relationships and experience to provide differentiated perspectives on various investments within the business services, industrials, technology, and financial services industries.

Hudson Hill is building a concentrated portfolio of private platforms that will develop over several years. We target businesses that participate in industries exhibiting strong, long-term secular tailwinds, coupled with the potential to grow organically and via strategic acquisitions.

Hudson Hill invests meaningful internal capital with like-minded equity partners. We offer partner-friendly capital and maintain a highly flexible investment approach.

Hudson Hill looks for substantial alignment in its investments. As a result, we tend to target family and entrepreneur-owned businesses with no prior institutional capital funding. The selling shareholders seek, and we encourage, equity rollover participation in our transactions.

name: CHANEL (1)
description:
Chanel is a private company and world leader in creating, manufacturing and distributing luxury products, including Ready-to-Wear, Accessories, Fragrances, Makeup, Skincare, Jewellery and Watches. Founded by Gabrielle Chanel in 1910, the House remains dedicated to exceptional craftsmanship and offering high-end creations. Chanel employs more than 32,000 people worldwide.​
​

As part of this, the House promotes arts, culture and creativity, while investing significantly in key areas including research & development, sustainability, and innovation.​
​

Chanel is dedicated to creating the conditions for people to perform at their best, building on their strengths and enabling them to benefit from new opportunities. It offers a unique working environment where people are given time to understand the brand, the business, and develop their personal motivations. This means everyone can grow, continue to be inspired and feel included, now and in the future. The company fosters true collaboration and respect for all, grounded in the belief that diversity is essential to the success of the organisation and its people.​
​

Chanel is committed to rewarding people competitively, as well as offering initiatives such as wellbeing programmes, learning and development opportunities, and parental leave for all parents globally.​

name: Cedaron Medical
description: Since Cedaron's founding with a NASA grant in 1990, the company's objective has been to create cutting edge medical software solutions and to deliver these technologies with best in class customer support. We provide tools to our specialty care customers that allow them to analyze their performance and their business to improve quality of care, reduce costs and increase their profitability. Cedaron's CardiacCare™ measures outcomes and quality in the Cardiology and Thoracic Surgery. Cedaron's Connect™ EMR is a suite of comprehensive clinical management services that measure outcomes and performance data in the rehabilitation field.

name: 2L Engineering
description:
2L is a professional MEP consulting engineering practice based in New York with a passion for building design and MEP services and energy integration.


2LS was formed in 2011 with a vision and desire to influence the industry with a wide range of international and local experience in Building Services Engineering and Energy consultancy.


We pride ourselves on our detailed design of building services MEP systems. We aim to deliver the best value and efficiency within capital cost constraints by working closely with the Design and Construction teams.


As MEP engineers we seek to provide integrated, efficient and elegant systems for our Clients for the internal environment and critical operation of their facilities, while providing the appropriate degree of flexibility and future adaptability. As environmental engineers we seek to incorporate a global view of energy consumption, embodied energy and sustainability into the design wherever possible.


Our team focuses on Clients, Architects and the Design Team at large, contributing to problem solving technically and efficiently. We define Client expectations early in the design process and by establishing the level of performance required of the end product, we can provide advice on the appropriate procurement route.

2L provides the following engineering services for new and existing buildings:

•	Strategic design 
•	Mechanical and environmental systems
•	Energy use and environmental studies
•	Plumbing systems
•	Fire protection and life safety
•	Master planning
•	Site assessments
•	Electrical systems
•	Lighting design
•	IT, Tel/Data systems
•	Security systems
•	Site supervision 
•	Space planning
•	Existing condition surveys 
•	Cost advice
•	Lease negotiation assistance

name: Wellthy
description:
Wellthy helps families balance work and caregiving responsibilities through a combination of precision technology and human expertise – a care concierge to help families navigate any care situation or challenge. By alleviating caregiving demands for caregivers through a digital dashboard and real-time advice from care experts, Wellthy makes it easier for caregivers to take care of their own health, reduce stress, save money, and stay engaged in their work and their lives while taking care of their loved ones. Nearly 2 million people have direct access to Wellthy’s services through some of the largest and best-known health plans and employers across the country. 

And we're hiring! Visit https://resources.wellthy.com/careers/ to see all of our open opportunities, or send your resume and cover letter to jobs@wellthy.com.

At Wellthy, we passionately care about our hiring processes and supporting candidates for roles. When we are hiring for new roles at Wellthy, you will a) only hear from official recruiters at Wellthy with a "@wellthy.com" email address, and b) see roles posted on our website's Careers page – https://resources.wellthy.com/careers/ – and our official social media accounts. 

If you find a role at Wellthy listed on or from any other source, double-check to make sure it's a role listed on our Careers page or on Wellthy’s social channels. 

Our team at Wellthy takes hiring seriously, and we care deeply about every candidate’s experience. Don’t ever hesitate to reach out to us at jobs@wellthy.com if you have any questions about roles at Wellthy.

The JLL Partners team is comprised of seasoned investment professionals and operating partners who are focused on driving long-term value creation across its portfolio. Since its founding in 1988, JLL Partners has committed over $5.8 billion of equity capital across eight private equity funds, with over 55 platform investments and more than 210 add-on acquisitions.

name: Choate, Hall & Stewart LLP
description: Choate provides business-oriented, targeted corporate governance guidance in high stakes issues such as disclosure, enforcement, investigations, transactions, proxy contests and takeover planning. We minimize director liability by proactively facilitating the timely adoption of current best practices and staying abreast of evolving trends. Our sophisticated securities litigation group gets involved early to consult on any sensitive or contentious corporate governance matter-the goal is to deflect litigation before it begins. We have consistently succeeded in derailing cases early through motions to dismiss, avoiding expensive and time-consuming discovery. Private Equity and Venture Capital-Related Mergers and Acquisitions Litigation.Choate litigators have substantial experience prosecuting and defending disputes stemming from private M&A transactions, including those involving working capital, earnout, business valuations and complex indemnification disputes in trial courts and arbitration forums. Our experience and strategies have resulted in eight-figure recoveries. e regularly work with accounting experts, and put our own high level of corporate finance knowledge and business experience to work for our clients. We also work closely with our transactional colleagues and clients on the front end of deals in an effort to avoid disputes so that our clients can minimize the hard dollar expense and the substantial distraction costs of litigation, and focus on developing their portfolio company's business.

name: Woodbridge International
description: Woodbridge Group is an innovative mergers and acquisitions (M&A) advisory firm focused on lower-middle market companies. We provide sell-side and buy-side advisory services to companies across a broad range of industries, managing deals with a transaction value of $5 million-$50 million. Woodbridge was founded in 1993 by Robert Koenig, shortly after he sold his former company - a $100 million manufacturer and distributor. Throughout the 1990's, the company completed transactions in a range of industries, serving nearly every type of enterprise: retailers, manufacturers, service providers and distributors. In 2004, the company pioneered the use of video marketing in the mergers and acquisitions industry. Woodbridge integrated video presentations into its sell-side process - a highly successful marketing component that has benefited clients and distinguished Woodbridge from other M&A firms. At this time, the firm also embarked on an accelerated growth plan to become a nationally recognized firm servicing the lower middle-market. The Company opened its New Jersey office in 2005. Expansion continued in 2006 with the launching of the firm's European office in the Netherlands, allowing Woodbridge to market its clients in Europe and the U.S. simultaneously. Also, in 2006, Woodbridge formed a wholly owned subsidiary, W G Securites, LLC which is a registered broker dealer, Member FINRA-SIPC. In 2007, the firm was engaged by two Asian-based companies, beginning Woodbridge's ongoing reach into Asia. Select Woodbridge clients can now be marketed to buyers or sellers in India, China and Japan. In 2008, Woodbridge closed its first deal in China and rolled out its Financing Services program to provide a range of capital formation services to middle-market companies. The firm also opened offices in California, Boston, Sao Paulo, Brazil, and one in the heart of midtown Manhattan. In addition, Woodbridge added nine seasoned dealmakers to significantly expand its capacity to serve clients across the country - and the globe. The firm opened four new regional offices in 2009: Dallas, Chicago, Toronto and Washington, D.C. Woodbridge continues to refine its innovative marketing approach to completing successful transactions in the lower middle-market. The company enjoys an impeccable reputation for integrity, creativity and persistence in delivering results to clients. WG Securities, LLC, a subsidiary of Woodbridge Group, LLC., is a registered broker-dealer.
